name: E-Daily Report
tagline: Digital Transformation of Employee Performance: Smart Solutions for Integrated & Location-Based Reporting.

data.title: Digital Transformation of Employee Performance
data.description: E-Daily Report transforms reporting from mere physical attendance into validated and spatially measured work output monitoring.

features.title: Location Tracking & Geotagging
features.desc: Monitor employee location and movement in real-time during field assignments (WFA) or WFH with high-precision mapping accuracy.

features.title: Multi-Level Digital Validation
features.desc: Digital report approval workflows by direct supervisors to ensure work output quality before it is consolidated into the system.

features.title: Integrated with Performance Targets (SKP)
features.desc: Daily activities (LKH) do not stand alone. The system automatically links and accumulates daily work into Employee Performance Target (SKP) achievements.

features.title: Digital Footprint & Objective Scoring
features.desc: Equipped with permanent Activity Logs to prevent data manipulation, along with transparent quantitative assessments like Approval Rates and work hour calculations.

items.title: Real Work Accountability
items.desc: Transforming attendance formality into evidence-based reporting (photos & documents) that is objectively validated.

items.title: Spatial WFH/WFA Monitoring
items.desc: An absolute solution for monitoring personnel during field assignments or remote work through GPS/GIS location visualization.

items.title: Seamless SKP Integration
items.desc: Daily activities are automatically accumulated into Employee Performance Targets (SKP), ensuring every task contributes to organizational goals.

items.title: Digital Footprint & Audit Trail
items.desc: All reporting history is stored in a permanent, encrypted log system, guaranteeing total transparency and preventing data manipulation.

items.q: How does E-Daily differentiate between standard attendance and performance appraisal?
items.a: Unlike conventional fingerprint attendance, E-Daily requires employees to input Daily Activity Logs (LKH) along with photo evidence and GPS coordinates, which must then be validated by supervisors to be calculated as performance achievement.

items.q: Is this system secure against location manipulation (Fake GPS)?
items.a: Yes, the E-Daily mobile application is equipped with multi-layered Mock Location detection and Geo-fencing to reject data if GPS spoofing apps are detected.

items.q: How is it integrated with Employee Benefit (TPP) calculations?
items.a: Our system generates comprehensive quantitative data recaps, ranging from effective work hours to report approval percentages, which can be exported directly as a basis for objective Employee Benefit (TPP) disbursement calculations.
